description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that runs on push to main and on pull requests to main. The workflow has three jobs: pre-commit, test, and test-aarch64. The pre-commit job checks out the code, sets up Python, installs dependencies, and runs pre-commit checks. The test job runs on a matrix of OS and Python versions, installing dependencies and running tests with pytest. The test-aarch64 job runs on ubuntu-latest, sets up QEMU, and tests on aarch64 with Docker.
